name: remediation-rental-20260329
args: apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y openssh-server rsync screen git curl python3 python3-pip python3-venv jq && mkdir -p /run/sshd /var/run/sshd && mkdir -p /root/.ssh && chmod 700 /root/.ssh && if [ -f /root/.ssh/authorized_keys ]; then echo auth_keys_present; else echo auth_keys_missing; fi && sed -i 's/^#*PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && sed -i 's/^#*PubkeyAuthentication.*/PubkeyAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && echo 'Port 2222' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config && /usr/sbin/sshd -D -e
